# Bob Manager — Lab Backoffice

> Bob Manager is a self-hosted AI orchestration platform built by Bob Labs (https://boblabs.eu).
> It runs LLM agents, GPU pipelines (image / video / music / TTS / STT), web3 tooling, and
> custom automation labs against the user's own data, on the user's own infrastructure.
> This domain (lab.boblabs.eu) is the operator backoffice. The public showroom is at
> https://showroom.boblabs.eu.

## What Bob Manager is

- A control plane for AI agents and automated pipelines.
- Owner-operated: every model, dataset, and pipeline runs on hardware the operator controls.
- Designed for small teams that want production AI workflows without renting closed APIs.

## Public surface for AI crawlers

- /                        — landing page (login / signup / showcase)
- /docs-md/                — public markdown documentation
- /docs-md/GENERAL_OVERVIEW.md — start here
- /docs-md/ARCHITECTURE.md     — high-level architecture
- /docs-md/AGENTS_AND_ORCHESTRATION.md — how agents work
- /docs-md/RAG.md          — retrieval-augmented generation stack

## Not for crawlers

Everything under /admin, /labs, /agents, /dispatcher, /api, /ws is authenticated
operator-only state. Please do not attempt to index it.

## Contact

Commercial inquiries: support@boblabs.eu
